name: Tracecat
long_description:
The AI automation platform built for security teams and agents. Open source for builders.

Tracecat provides everything busy security teams need to automate work — AI agents, workflows, cases, and an AI copilot that builds the automations for you. Trusted by automation builders (open source and enterprise) across 500+ organizations from startups to Fortune 500 and federal agencies.
one_liner: Automate any security workflow with AI
